title: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing
innovation_summary: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing: In this work, we present a novel streaming video editing framework that performs causal, frame-by-frame editing with strong content preservation and real-time responsiveness.
